specific_overrides.headline_without_symbol: duplicate symbol definition reported by linker
specific_overrides.first_action_hint: remove the duplicate definition or make the symbol internal to one translation unit
define the missing symbol or link the object/library that provides it

compiler_groups.headline: preprocessor directive error
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: inspect the failing preprocessor directive or disabled branch expression in the preserved raw diagnostics

compiler_groups.headline: template constraint not satisfied
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: match the required concept or requires-clause against the actual template arguments

compiler_groups.headline: initialization order or aggregate init issue
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: reorder member initializers to match declaration order, or fix the initializer list

compiler_groups.headline: non-standard or non-portable extension used
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: use the standard-conforming alternative or pass the required -std= flag
match_any: forbids converting a string constant to

compiler_groups.headline: storage class or linkage conflict
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: use a single consistent storage class specifier and linkage for the declaration
match_any: multiple storage classes in declaration specifiers

compiler_groups.first_action_hint: verify the first compiler-reported location against the preserved raw diagnostics

compiler_groups.headline: identifier not found in scope
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: check for typos, missing #include, or missing namespace qualifier
match_any: was not declared in this scope
is not a class, namespace, or enumeration

compiler_groups.headline: duplicate definition detected
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: add or fix include guards, or remove the duplicate definition

compiler_groups.headline: use of a deleted or unavailable function
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: check whether the type is movable/copyable, or provide the required special member

compiler_groups.headline: unused declaration detected
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: remove the unused declaration or prefix with underscore if intentional

compiler_groups.headline: missing or incorrect return statement
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: add a return statement to all control-flow paths of the non-void function
match_any: no return statement in function returning non-void
control reaches end of non-void function
return-statement with a value, in function returning 'void'
return-statement with no value, in function returning
'return' with a value in function returning void

compiler_groups.headline: implicit fallthrough between switch cases
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: add a break, return, or [[fallthrough]] attribute between cases

compiler_groups.headline: potential buffer overflow or memory overlap
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: check buffer sizes and ensure source and destination do not overlap
match_any: bytes into a region of size
source argument is the same as destination
may write a terminating nul past the end

compiler_groups.headline: format string type mismatch
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: match the format specifier to the argument type, or use type-safe I/O
match_any: format string is not a string literal

compiler_groups.headline: variable used without initialization
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: initialize the variable at its declaration or before first use

compiler_groups.headline: static analysis found a potential defect
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: follow the analyzer event path and fix the first invalid state transition

compiler_groups.headline: potential null pointer issue
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: remove the redundant null check or guard the dereference with a null check

compiler_groups.headline: integer arithmetic issue detected
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: check the operand types and value ranges to prevent undefined behavior
match_any: is always true due to limited range
is always false due to limited range

compiler_groups.headline: enum or switch coverage issue
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: add missing case labels or a default case to handle all enum values

compiler_groups.headline: implicit or narrowing conversion detected
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: add an explicit cast or change the variable type to match

compiler_groups.headline: const qualification violation
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: make the destination const-correct or remove the const from the source
match_any: qualifiers ignored on function return type

compiler_groups.headline: unnecessary or incorrect move operation
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: remove the std::move to allow copy elision, or fix the value category
match_any: moving a local object in a return

compiler_groups.headline: strict aliasing rule violation
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: use memcpy or a union for type punning instead of pointer casts

compiler_groups.headline: ABI or alignment compatibility issue
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: check struct packing, alignment attributes, and target-specific ABI requirements
match_any: increases required alignment of target type

compiler_groups.headline: exception handling configuration or usage error
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: enable -fexceptions/-frtti or adjust the exception specification

compiler_groups.headline: function or type attribute issue
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: check the attribute spelling, placement, and argument requirements

compiler_groups.headline: ODR violation or inline linkage mismatch
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: ensure the inline function is defined in a header or fix the type mismatch across TUs
match_any: always_inline function might not be inlinable

compiler_groups.headline: suspicious sizeof usage or allocation size
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: check whether sizeof is applied to the intended type rather than a pointer
match_any: invalid application of 'sizeof' to incomplete type

compiler_groups.headline: invalid pointer or reference operation
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: provide the full type definition via #include or fix the value category

compiler_groups.headline: access to private or protected member
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: use a public interface, add a friend declaration, or change access specifier

compiler_groups.headline: inheritance or virtual function error
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: implement all pure virtual functions or fix the class hierarchy

compiler_groups.headline: compile-time evaluation failure
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: ensure all expressions and function calls in the constexpr context are constant-evaluable
match_any: not usable in a constant expression

compiler_groups.headline: lambda capture error
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: add the variable to the capture list or specify a default capture mode [=] or [&]

compiler_groups.headline: dangling pointer or reference to local
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: return by value instead of by pointer/reference, or extend the object lifetime
match_any: storing the address of local variable

compiler_groups.headline: coroutine promise type error
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: define a valid promise_type or align the coroutine return type with the coroutine body

compiler_groups.headline: C++20 module import error
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: build or export the requested module interface before importing it
match_any: imports must be built before being imported

compiler_groups.headline: use of deprecated feature
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: replace the deprecated API with the recommended alternative or silence the warning intentionally

compiler_groups.headline: template instantiation failed
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: start from the first user-owned template frame and match template arguments

compiler_groups.headline: type or overload mismatch
compiler_groups.first_action_hint: compare the expected type and actual argument at the call site
inspect the preserved raw diagnostics for the first corrective action

linker_groups.headline_template: driver reported a fatal compiler failure
linker_groups.first_action_hint: inspect the preserved raw diagnostics for the first failing compiler/tool invocation

linker_groups.headline_template: compiler frontend reported an internal compiler error
linker_groups.first_action_hint: preserve the raw diagnostics and reduce the input before filing a compiler bug
define the missing symbol or link the object/library that provides it
remove the duplicate definition or make the symbol `static`/`inline` as appropriate
check the library search path and whether the archive is installed

linker_groups.headline_template: linker file format or relocation failure
linker_groups.first_action_hint: check object compatibility, target triple, and archive contents

linker_groups.headline_template: driver reported a linker failure summary
linker_groups.first_action_hint: inspect the linker diagnostics immediately above this summary
inspect the assembly-related stderr lines and the referenced source location

passthrough.headline: unclassified residual diagnostics
passthrough.first_action_hint: inspect the preserved compiler stderr for details
